Your <retrieve_tools> block contained invalid JSON.

Expected structure:

<retrieve_tools>
{
  "meta_tool": "by_output_info or by_inputs or by_io_info",
  "...": "required fields depend on meta_tool"
}
</retrieve_tools>

- The outer object MUST contain "meta_tool".
- Follow the meta-tool schema for required fields.

This is attempt {current_attempt} of {max_retrieval_errors}.
In your next assistant response, send a valid <retrieve_tools> block with correctly formatted JSON.
